sentences.english: In contrast to pre-made playgrounds, where swings and slides are fixed in place, adventure playgrounds provide pieces of building materials for kids to build things themselves.
sentences.korean: 그네와 미끄럼틀이 고정된 기성 놀이터와 달리, 모험 놀이터는 아이들이 직접 무언가를 만들 수 있도록 건축 자재를 제공해요.

sentences.english: It's one hundred percent crucial for their development.
Kids build resiliency, confidence, coping strategies, regulation strategies.
sentences.korean: 회복력, 자신감, 대처 전략, 조절 전략을 쌓아요.

sentences.english: So many of the skills that we know lead to healthy human development are developed in play.
sentences.korean: 건강한 인간 발달로 이끄는 많은 기술이 놀이에서 발달해요.

sentences.english: The answer to my quiz question is that adventure playgrounds were invented by Danish architect Carl Theodor Sorensen.
sentences.korean: 퀴즈 답은 모험 놀이터가 덴마크 건축가 칼 테오도르 소렌센에 의해 발명되었다는 거예요.

quiz.question: What does '100% — 완전히 (동의나 강조를 나타냄)' mean in English?
